logic: 1 sets Female (女) as Semantic. Defaults to Phonetic for Horse (馬).
Water is semantic; Win(+) is hybrid.
Operator Immunity rule: '2' covers both Gate (門) and Tree (木) as Semantic, ignoring the '⿵' operator.
AST Integrity rule: Stream logic (3) assigns Semantic roles to all three Dragons, while the operators (⿱, ⿰) build the tree independently.
Inline placement: The '1' specifically targets the Shell/Money (貝) as the core Semantic root deep within the structural tree.
Directional Compression: Base unit '木' + 1 repetition. Both are Semantic.
